ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spacecraft" (
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spacecraft */,
  "spacecraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the spacecraft */,
  "launch_year" INTEGER /* Year the spacecraft was launched */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Company or organization that manufactured the spacecraft */,
  "launch_site" TEXT /* Location where the spacecraft was launched */,
  "mission_status" TEXT /* Current status of the spacecraft (e.g., active, inactive, decommissioned) */,
  "total_mission_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of all missions conducted by the spacecraft in days */,
  "mission_count" INTEGER /* Total number of missions conducted by the spacecraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spacecraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "spacecraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spacecraft conducting the mission */,
  "planet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the planet visited */,
  "mission_type" INTEGER /* ID of the mission type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the mission */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the mission */,
  "duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the mission in days */,
  "success_status" TEXT /* Success status of the mission (e.g., successful, partially successful, failed) */,
  "mission_objectives" TEXT /* Brief description of the mission objectives */,
  "data_collected" TEXT /* Summary of the data collected during the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_mission_type FOREIGN KEY ("mission_type") REFERENCES mission_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_spacecraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("spacecraft_id") REFERENCES spacecraft ("spacecraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_planet_id FOREIGN KEY ("planet_id") REFERENCES planets ("planet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planets" (
  "planet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planet */,
  "planet_name" TEXT /* Name of the planet */,
  "distance_from_sun" INTEGER /* Average distance of the planet from the Sun in millions of kilometers */,
  "orbital_period" INTEGER /* Orbital period of the planet in days */,
  "rotation_period" INTEGER /* Rotation period of the planet in hours */,
  "atmospheric_composition" TEXT /* Brief description of the planet's atmospheric composition */,
  "surface_conditions" TEXT /* Brief description of the planet's surface conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("planet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission type (e.g., Flyby, Orbiter, Lander) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mission type */,
  "complexity_level" INTEGER /* Numerical value representing the complexity of the mission type (e.g., 1 for simple, 5 for complex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., mission update, data analysis, anomaly) */,
  "log_author" TEXT /* Name of the person who created the log entry */,
  "log_category" TEXT /* Category of the log entry (e.g., technical, operational, scientific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_logs_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)
